purpose: add_fact_from_json's malformed arms: missing file ('JSON file not found: <path>'); a non-integer start_time ("Item 0: Failed to parse fact - Item 0: Invalid start_time 'soon'" — doubled prefix, re-wrapped at pyreason.py:1281); a missing fact_text (same doubled shape); an unparseable fact_text (single prefix — the fact parser's own ValueError 'Missing closing parenthesis in fact' carries no item tag); a duplicate name at item 1 raising AFTER item 0 loaded (the partial load has no accessor to observe — named unobserved); and a non-array document ('array of fact objects'). The loaded-fact state after each raise is unobservable at this seam (no fact accessor at the pin) — the outcome records are the compared observations.
provenance: docs/surface.md fn:add_fact_from_json malformed-* classes; pyreason.py:1240-1292 at the pin; exception text screened live 2026-07-07
